question: What is the main purpose of the title 'toutai' in Moana 2?
options: A secret role connecting the navigator to the ocean and ancestors
A prize for winning a race
A title given to the village chief
answer_en: A secret role connecting the navigator to the ocean and ancestors
answer_zh: 連結航海者與海洋及祖先的秘密角色
answer_ja: 航海者を海と先祖に繋ぐ秘密の役割

question: What does the phrase 'the future that lies beyond' mean in the lesson?
options: The future is unknown and ahead of us
The future is easy to predict
answer_en: The future is unknown and ahead of us
answer_zh: 未來是未知且在我們前方
answer_ja: 未来は未知で私たちの前にある

question: Why does Moana need a crew for her journey?
options: Because the journey is long and difficult
Because she wants to have a party
Because the ocean is dangerous only at night
answer_en: Because the journey is long and difficult
answer_zh: 因為旅程漫長且困難
answer_ja: 旅は長くて困難だから

question: What is the meaning of 'make it' in the context of the lesson?
options: To succeed or arrive somewhere successfully
answer_en: To succeed or arrive somewhere successfully
answer_zh: 成功或順利抵達某地
answer_ja: 成功するか無事に到着する

question: What does the phrase 'I could really use your help' mean?
answer_en: I need your help
answer_zh: 我需要你的幫助
answer_ja: あなたの助けが必要です

question: What is the significance of the 'ava' drink in the ceremony?
options: It is a traditional Polynesian ceremonial beverage
It is a type of fruit juice
It is a modern energy drink
It is a type of tea
answer_en: It is a traditional Polynesian ceremonial beverage
answer_zh: 傳統波利尼西亞儀式飲料
answer_ja: 伝統的なポリネシアの儀式用飲料

question: What does the phrase 'rise to the occasion' mean?
options: To perform well during a difficult situation
answer_en: To perform well during a difficult situation
answer_zh: 在困難情況下表現出色
answer_ja: 困難な状況でうまくやる

question: What does 'starve' mean in the lesson context?
options: To suffer or die from lack of food
answer_en: To suffer or die from lack of food
answer_zh: 因缺乏食物而受苦或死亡
answer_ja: 食べ物がなくて苦しむまたは死ぬ

question: What is the meaning of 'eyewitness'?
options: Someone who personally saw an event happen
Someone who reads about an event
answer_en: Someone who personally saw an event happen
answer_zh: 親眼目睹事件的人
answer_ja: 事件を直接見た人

question: What does 'walk into that one' mean in the conversation?
options: To fall into a trap or trick unintentionally
answer_en: To fall into a trap or trick unintentionally
answer_zh: 無意中陷入陷阱或被騙
answer_ja: 無意に罠やトリックにかかる

question: How many years after the first film does Moana 2 take place?
answer_en: Three years
answer_zh: 三年後
answer_ja: 3年後

question: What is the traditional plant used to make the ceremonial drink Ava?
options: The root of the kava plant
The leaves of the tea plant
The fruit of the coconut tree
The bark of the oak tree
answer_en: The root of the kava plant
answer_zh: 卡瓦植物的根
answer_ja: カヴァ植物の根

question: What does Chief Tui do during the special feast?
options: Speaks to the whole community and introduces an ancient tradition
answer_en: Speaks to the whole community and introduces an ancient tradition
answer_zh: 對全社區發言並介紹古老傳統
answer_ja: コミュニティ全体に話し、古い伝統を紹介する

question: What is the meaning of 'top-of-the-line' in the lesson?
options: The highest quality or most advanced option
answer_en: The highest quality or most advanced option
answer_zh: 最高品質或最先進的選項
answer_ja: 最高品質または最先端の選択肢

question: What does 'double-hull design' refer to?
options: A canoe with two parallel hulls for stability
answer_en: A canoe with two parallel hulls for stability
answer_zh: 有兩個平行船體以增加穩定性的獨木舟
answer_ja: 安定性のために2つの平行船体を持つカヌー

question: Who is Kelly in the lesson?
options: The master farmer in the village
answer_en: The master farmer in the village
answer_zh: 村裡的農業高手
answer_ja: 村の熟練農夫

question: What does 'plant propagation' mean?
options: The process of growing new plants from seeds or cuttings
answer_en: The process of growing new plants from seeds or cuttings
answer_zh: 從種子或插枝繁殖植物的過程
answer_ja: 種子や挿し木から新しい植物を育てる過程

question: What does Moana mean by 'it's been a while'?
options: It has been a long time since something happened
answer_en: It has been a long time since something happened
answer_zh: 某事已經過了很長時間
answer_ja: 何かが起こってから長い時間が経った

question: What is the role of an eyewitness according to the lesson?
options: Someone who personally saw an event and can describe it
Someone who reads about an event
answer_en: Someone who personally saw an event and can describe it
answer_zh: 親眼目睹事件並能描述的人
answer_ja: 事件を直接見て説明できる人

question: What does 'connected speech' refer to in the lesson?
options: How native speakers link words together smoothly
answer_en: How native speakers link words together smoothly
answer_zh: 母語者如何流暢連接單字
answer_ja: ネイティブが単語を滑らかに繋げる方法

question: What does 'bestow' mean?
answer_en: To give something valuable formally
answer_zh: 正式地給予有價值的東西
answer_ja: 正式に価値あるものを与える

question: What is the meaning of 'ava' or 'kava'?
answer_en: A traditional Polynesian ceremonial beverage
answer_zh: 傳統波利尼西亞儀式飲料
answer_ja: 伝統的なポリネシアの儀式用飲料

question: What does 'rise' mean in the phrase 'people will rise'?
options: To step up and prove themselves capable
answer_en: To step up and prove themselves capable
answer_zh: 挺身而出證明自己有能力
answer_ja: 立ち上がって自分の能力を証明する

question: What does 'make it' mean in the lesson?
options: To succeed or arrive somewhere successfully
answer_en: To succeed or arrive somewhere successfully
answer_zh: 成功或順利抵達某地
answer_ja: 成功するか無事に到着する

question: What does 'slink' mean when describing a design?
answer_en: Elegantly designed and visually appealing
answer_zh: 優雅設計且視覺吸引人
answer_ja: エレガントで見た目が良い

question: What is 'irrigation'?
options: A system to bring water to crops
answer_en: A system to bring water to crops
answer_zh: 將水引到農作物的系統
answer_ja: 作物に水を供給するシステム

question: What does 'propagation' mean in the context of plants?
options: The process of growing new plants from seeds or cuttings
answer_en: The process of growing new plants from seeds or cuttings
answer_zh: 從種子或插枝繁殖植物的過程
answer_ja: 種子や挿し木から新しい植物を育てる過程

question: What does 'starve' mean in casual speech?
answer_en: To be very hungry
answer_zh: 非常餓
answer_ja: とてもお腹が空いている

question: What does 'apprentice' mean?
options: A person learning a skill from a master
answer_en: A person learning a skill from a master
answer_zh: 向高手學習技能的人
answer_ja: 師匠から技術を学ぶ人

question: What does 'top-of-the-line' mean?
options: The highest quality or most advanced
answer_en: The highest quality or most advanced
answer_zh: 最高品質或最先進的
answer_ja: 最高品質または最先端の

question: How would you use 'may the ancestors continue to guide us' in a sentence?
options: As a blessing or hope for guidance
As a question about the past
As a description of a place
answer_en: As a blessing or hope for guidance
answer_zh: 作為祝福或希望得到指引
answer_ja: 祝福や導きを願う表現として

question: How can you explain the phrase 'to bestow a title' to someone?
options: To formally give an important title or honor
answer_en: To formally give an important title or honor
answer_zh: 正式授予重要的稱號或榮譽
answer_ja: 正式に重要な称号や名誉を与えること

question: What would you say to encourage someone to 'rise to the occasion'?
options: You can do it, show your best!
answer_en: You can do it, show your best!
answer_zh: 你可以的，展現最好的一面！
answer_ja: 君ならできる、ベストを尽くして！

question: How would you use 'I could really use your help' in daily conversation?
answer_en: To politely ask for assistance
answer_zh: 禮貌地請求幫助
answer_ja: 丁寧に助けを求める

question: How can you explain the use of 'yet' in 'best canoe yet'?
options: So far or up to this point
answer_en: So far or up to this point
answer_zh: 到目前為止
answer_ja: これまでのところ

question: How would you explain 'connected speech' to a language learner?
options: How native speakers link words smoothly in conversation
answer_en: How native speakers link words smoothly in conversation
answer_zh: 母語者在對話中流暢連接單字的方式
answer_ja: ネイティブが会話で単語を滑らかに繋げる方法

question: How can you use 'walk into' in a sentence to describe a mistake?
options: I walked into a trap without realizing it
I walked into the room quickly
I walked into the store to buy food
I walked into the park for exercise
answer_en: I walked into a trap without realizing it
answer_zh: 我不知不覺陷入陷阱
answer_ja: 気づかずに罠にかかった

question: How would you explain the phrase 'it's been a while' to a friend?
options: It means a long time has passed since we last met
It means something is very short
answer_en: It means a long time has passed since we last met
answer_zh: 表示我們很久沒見面了
answer_ja: 久しぶりに会ったことを意味する

question: How can you use 'to starve' in a casual conversation?
answer_en: I'm starving, let's eat now!
answer_zh: 我餓死了，我們現在吃吧！
answer_ja: お腹が空いた、今すぐ食べよう！

question: How would you describe a 'top-of-the-line' product to someone?
options: It is the best and most advanced version available
answer_en: It is the best and most advanced version available
answer_zh: 是最好的且最先進的版本
answer_ja: 最高で最先端のバージョン
